news.headline: FDA approved Fapon Biopharma's IND for FP008, a first-in-class immunotherapy for solid tumors on Feb. 28, 2025.
news.summary: DONGGUAN, China - On February 28, 2025, Fapon Biopharma, a leading biotech company specializing in therapeutic antibodies and fusion proteins, received approval from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for their Investigational New Drug (IND) application for FP008. This marks a significant milestone for the company as they continue their innovative work in the biopharmaceutical industry.

Bitcoin is nearing key support levels after falling nearly 30% from its peak. When will it hit bottom?
news.summary: Bitcoin is currently testing support levels that have not been seen in several months. The cryptocurrency has experienced a significant drop of nearly 30% from its all-time high. Traders are now speculating on where the price of BTC will stabilize and establish a firm floor amidst this downturn.

news.headline: British heritage brand Kent & Curwen returns to London Fashion Week for AW25, exploring the concept of crossing thresholds. Inspired by C.S. Lewis, the collection pays homage to childhood adventures.
news.summary: In London on February 28, 2025, fashion brand KENT&CURWEN presents its AW25 collection centered around the concept of crossing thresholds, symbolizing the transition from the familiar to the unknown. Drawing inspiration from C.S. Lewis' childhood experiences in Northern Ireland, the collection captures the essence of dressing up and storytelling as gateways to new and imaginative worlds. This season, the brand showcases designs that embody this theme, aiming to evoke a sense of exploration and adventure.

news.summary: On February 28, 2025, HI-VIEW RESOURCES INC. (‘HI-VIEW' OR THE ‘COMPANY’) revealed its participation in the Prospectors & Developers Association of Canada’s (PDAC) Convention at the Metro Toronto Convention Centre from March 2nd to March 5th, 2025. The Company will be available at Booth #3210 in the Investor’s Exchange. HI-VIEW is listed under CSE: HVW, OTCQB: HVWRF, and FSE: B63.

Global heat pump market to reach $157.8B by 2029, with a CAGR of 11.8%. Versatile and eco-friendly systems driving growth.
news.summary: The global Heat Pump Market is projected to grow at a CAGR of 11.8%, increasing from USD 90.1 billion in 2024 to USD 157.8 billion by 2029. The versatile nature of heat pumps is contributing to the transition towards a cleaner world and a stronger global economy. The amalgamation of heat pump systems with renewable energy sources such as solar and wind power is driving their increased demand, aligning with global efforts to reduce reliance on fossil fuels and decrease carbon footprints. Government support and stringent safety regulations are key factors propelling the growth of this market. Stringent regulations aimed at reducing greenhouse gas emissions and promoting energy efficiency are also driving the adoption of heat pumps, which are more energy-efficient than traditional heating and cooling systems.

City Finance releases €25M notes under MTN program.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global death toll from the ongoing pandemic has surpassed 4.5 million, with over 220 million confirmed cases worldwide. The United States continues to be the most affected country, with over 41 million cases and 680,000 deaths. In India, there have been 33 million cases and 440,000 deaths reported. The United Kingdom has seen 8.5 million cases and 180,000 deaths. These numbers underscore the significant impact of the pandemic on a global scale, highlighting the importance of continued vigilance and preventive measures to combat the spread of the virus.

news.headline: Municipality Finance releases EUR 20M notes through MTN programme.
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has decreased to 4.2%, showing a notable improvement from the previous rate of 5.5%. Additionally, the GDP growth for the last quarter has exceeded expectations, reaching 6.5%. The government has announced a new stimulus package of $1.9 trillion to further boost the economy and support struggling industries. These positive economic indicators suggest a potential recovery from the impact of the pandemic.

news.headline: Billions.Network debuts private digital ID to compete with Worldcoin, using zero-knowledge proofs for security. #privacy903876
news.summary: Billions.Network has introduced a cutting-edge ID verification platform that does not rely on biometric information. Instead, it utilizes zero-knowledge proofs to ensure both privacy and security. This technology provides a reliable and secure alternative to traditional methods of identification verification, making it a promising option for individuals and businesses seeking a more secure way to confirm identities.

ProSiebenSat.1 extends partnership with SES, distributing programs in Germany and Austria. SES operates at prime video neighbourhood.
news.summary: Luxembourg-based company SES has recently revealed a new multi-year deal with ProSiebenSat.1. The agreement ensures that ProSiebenSat.1 will persist in broadcasting its content in both Germany and Austria by utilizing SES’s satellites situated at the important video location of 19.2 degrees East. Furthermore, ProSiebenSat.1 plans to merge content from its German streaming service, Joyn, with SES’s HD+ TV App. This pact not only extends ProSiebenSat.1’s satellite capacity but also boosts its presence in the German market.

International Paper appoints Tim Nicholls as President of DS Smith and Lance Loeffler as CFO. Feb. 28, 2025. -NYSE: IP; LSE: IPC.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on February 28, 2025, Tim Nicholls has been appointed as the Executive Vice President and President of DS Smith, which is a subsidiary of International Paper. Alongside this, Lance Loeffler has been designated as the Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. VILVI Group's 2024 sales revenue rises by 16.6% to EUR 245.4 million, net profit up to EUR 25.7 million, a 75.1% increase from 2023.
news.summary: In the preliminary unaudited data, the VILVI Group reported consolidated sales revenue of EUR 245.4 million for the 12 months of 2024, showing a 16.6% increase from the previous year's revenue of EUR 210.5 million in 2023. Additionally, the group's net profit for 2024 stood at EUR 25.7 million, marking a substantial 75.1% increase compared to the previous year's figures in 2023.

Pearson teams up with AWS to improve personalized learning for millions worldwide using cloud and AI technologies.
news.summary: A partnership aimed at improving education for a vast audience is set to leverage cloud technology and artificial intelligence. Pearson plans to broaden its adoption of AWS cloud resources and AI features with the help of Amazon Bedrock. This collaboration is expected to enhance the learning experience for millions of individuals by tailoring education to personal needs and providing instant feedback.
